overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city during golden hour. The scene transitions from a covered waterfront walkway under an overpass to an open urban promenade with wet reflective pavement, dense cyberpunk architecture, palm trees, and moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass along the waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair wearing a yellow top and green pants walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large elevated highway structure with support columns creating a covered walkway
illuminated digital advertisement display showing 'ALL FOODS' branding with a cartoon mascot
recently rained-on concrete sidewalk reflecting the warm golden hour light and neon signs
black metal guardrail running along the right side overlooking water
illuminated signage and advertisements on distant buildings visible through the overpass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive concrete overpass structure that creates a semi-covered waterfront walkway. The camera follows a woman with distinctive red hair and a yellow top as she walks along wet pavement that reflects the warm golden hour light. An illuminated 'All Foods' advertisement kiosk stands prominently in the center of the walkway, while neon signs from distant buildings are visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from covered walkway to open urban street

events.description: exits the covered overpass area into open sunlight along the waterfront
camera switches from following red-haired character to following a muscular character with back tattoos
futuristic white sedan drives past on the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade now following a muscular character with extensive back tattoos

notable_agents.action: muscular character with geometric back tattoos and sleeveless shirt walking ahead

entered.detail: busy street with multiple lanes of traffic running parallel to the walkway
row of palm trees lining the opposite side of the street
stream of futuristic cars and sedans driving along the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into direct golden hour sunlight, revealing a busy multi-lane urban road to the left with futuristic traffic. The camera switches to follow a new character with distinctive back tattoos. Palm trees line the distant street while the wet pavement continues to reflect the warm light. A white futuristic sedan drives past as the scene opens up to the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade alongside busy arterial road

events.description: purple futuristic coupe drives past on the left side road
red sports car speeds by on the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the open promenade passing other pedestrians and observing the traffic

entered.detail: massive red illuminated advertisement screen displaying '35.7%' and other graphics
tall modern skyscrapers with reflective glass facades lining the street
bright purple automated vending kiosk on the right side of the walkway
various illuminated signs and holographic advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment continues along the open waterfront promenade with moderate pedestrian traffic. The multi-lane road to the left features a steady stream of futuristic vehicles including a purple coupe and red sports car. Large digital billboards and neon signage adorn the glass office towers, while a distinctive purple vending machine appears on the right. The warm golden hour light creates long shadows across the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy waterfront promenade approaching city center plaza

events.description: pedestrian density increases significantly as the camera approaches a crowded area ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through increasingly dense crowds of pedestrians along the promenade

entered.detail: panoramic view of futuristic skyscrapers and towers including a distinctive tall spire
elevated walkway or monorail structure spanning across the distant view

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching a densely populated area of the promenade with many pedestrians walking in the same direction. The city skyline opens up ahead, revealing a distinctive tall spire tower and an overhead pedestrian bridge in the distance. The multi-lane road continues to the left with sporadic traffic, while the right side maintains the waterfront railing. The atmosphere suggests approaching a major city center plaza or landmark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered waterfront walkway into a sprawling, sun-drenched urban promenade. It begins under a massive concrete overpass where a woman in a yellow top walks past an illuminated All Foods kiosk on wet, reflective pavement. As the camera emerges from the shadows into direct golden hour sunlight, the view expands to reveal a busy multi-lane road with futuristic sedans and palm trees lining the street. The scene then shifts to follow a character with back tattoos along the open waterfront, passing purple vending machines and glass office towers adorned with glowing digital billboards. Finally, the camera pushes forward through a growing crowd of pedestrians toward a dense city center, where the skyline opens up to reveal a towering spire and an overhead pedestrian bridge.
